Assoc. Prof. Dr. Oğuzhan Ceylan met with students at Atatürk Anatolian High School within the scope of TÜBİTAK Science Talks

Atatürk Anatolian High School hosted the last event of TÜBİTAK’s prestigious Science Talks series. In this special event, Assoc. Prof. Oğuzhan Ceylan from the Department of Management Information Systems at Kadir Has University took part as a speaker.
